overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red coat exploring a ruined stone castle at night. The character walks along elevated stone walkways, encounters a zombie-like creature, and descends into a circular courtyard with a large central statue.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior walkway with grass verge

events.description: ground surface transitions from grass to stone pavement alongside the castle wall

agents.ego_description: character in red coat walking steadily along the castle exterior wall

entered.detail: tall weathered stone brick wall with small windows
tall stone tower with broken top visible against the sky
stone railing with decorative pillars overlooking lower level
wet reflective stone tiles forming the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the exterior of a ruined castle at night, transitioning from grass to a stone paved walkway. A tall stone wall runs along the left while a decorative stone balustrade lines the right side overlooking the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated castle walkway with stone balustrade

events.description: entering darker shadow cast by the main castle structure
humanoid creature comes into view standing by the railing ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway approaching a figure in the distance

notable_agents.action: emaciated humanoid creature standing motionless by the stone railing

entered.detail: wide stone staircase descending to lower level
distant mountain range visible under dark blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the elevated stone walkway, passing into shadow cast by the castle walls. A stone staircase appears on the right leading downward, and a humanoid creature becomes visible standing ahead by the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle overlook terrace with ruined entrance

events.description: character slows and stops beside the creature at the railing
camera pans to reveal large ruined castle entrance with glowing orange interior

agents.ego_description: character approaches the creature and stands beside it looking over the railing, then observes the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: emaciated creature leaning over the balustrade looking down at the ground below

entered.detail: large Gothic archway with broken roof and glowing warm light from within
ornate stone portal with pointed arch and damaged masonry

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the creature and stands beside it at the railing. The camera pans to reveal a magnificent ruined castle entrance with a glowing interior. The creature leans over the balustrade while the character observes the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular castle courtyard with central monument

events.description: character turns away from creature and begins descending stone stairs
entering circular courtyard with large central statue

agents.ego_description: character walks away from the creature, descends the stairs, and proceeds through the courtyard toward the exit gate

notable_agents.action: creature following behind the character at a distance down the stairs

entered.detail: tall dark stone monument with fire burning at its base in circular plaza
fortified stone gateway leading out of the castle grounds
open plaza with curved stone walls and scattered trees

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the creature behind and descends the stone stairs into a circular courtyard. A large dark statue with a burning base dominates the center of the plaza. The creature follows at a distance as the character walks toward the exit gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the exterior walkways of a ruined castle at night into a dark, statue-filled courtyard. It begins with the character transitioning from grass onto a stone paved walkway, flanked by a tall wall and a decorative balustrade. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into deep shadows where a stone staircase appears and a humanoid creature emerges by the railing. The camera then pans to reveal a magnificent castle entrance with a glowing interior as the character pauses beside the creature, before turning to descend the stairs. Finally, the movement opens into a circular courtyard dominated by a large dark statue with a burning base, with the creature following from a distance as the character walks toward the exit gate.
